subject:
Re: I create an artifact map of teamtomo.org EMPIAR-10164 dataset
 in 1.6Apx
body:
To display the results, I change the command line like this in *highlight*
[image: 1624273900(1).png]

And then, the 4 dview map were there:
[image: 1624273765(1).jpg]
[image: 1624273800(1).png]
[image: 1624273814(1).png]
[image: 1624273875(1).png]

Are these results right for whole dataset alignment?
在2021年6月21日星期一 UTC+8 下午6:53:20<yuqi zhang> 写道：

> Besides only run the script "align_symmetry_axis", I didn't know any other 
> thing I should do.
> 在2021年6月21日星期一 UTC+8 下午6:43:14<yuqi zhang> 写道：
>
>> When I run the script "align_symmetry_axis". There was an error 
>> information:
>> [image: 1624271983(1).png]
>>
>> So I do the "%" to this command line. And in the left column, there was 
>> the result in the folder "inimodel/results/ite_0008averages/".
>> I think the "%" may be OK. Anyway, you can tell me how to debug for this 
>> if you like.
>> 在2021年6月21日星期一 UTC+8 下午6:29:08<alist...@gmail.com> 写道：
>>
>>> Hi Yuqi,
>>>
>>> The result below shows that you aligned to a reference which was not 
>>> centered on the 6-fold axis - this is where your problems come from, same 
>>> advice from my previous message applies :)
>>>
>>> Cheers,
>>>
>>> Alister
>>>
>>> And then, I continued to* align all particles*.
>>> The folder *findallData.Data* contains *31561* particles  *without dBox 
>>> mode*. 
>>> I used the dcp in dynamo and the result was like this:
>>> [image: 1624031060(1).png][image: 1624032003(1).jpg]
>>>
>>>
>>>
>>>
